notableEvents.label: Teoscar Hernández GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Kyle Tucker out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Yuki Matsui. Tommy Edman scores.

notableEvents.label: Tommy Edman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tommy Edman grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Tommy Edman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Tommy Edman to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Samad Taylor out at 2nd. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar singles on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Samad Taylor scores. Manny Machado to 2nd.
